fixtureNotes: 10 fills, 5 closed paired trades, 0 open. Different schema from spot (RealizedProfit column, no quote-currency suffix in Amount). Edge cases: (a) SHORT positions where Sell comes BEFORE Buy (ETHUSDT, BTCUSDT 9-10) — parser must NOT discard or assume long-only, (b) RealizedProfit column already supplies realized P&L per close — parser should match these, (c) BTCUSDT traded across 3 distinct round-trips on different days — parser must not collapse, (d) WEEKEND timestamp Apr 19 22:00 (Sunday) — crypto futures trade 24/7, must accept. Profitable short on ETHUSDT (sold high 3290, bought back lower 3265 = profit on short).
shortTradesNote: ETHUSDT and BTCUSDT pair #3 are SHORTS — sell came first. If parser assumes long-only or pairs by chronological BUY→SELL only, it will mis-pair these and produce wrong P&L.
